summary: Read-only R4 final recheck inspected revised completion docs plus behavior evaluation, compounding, and feedback correction code paths. Verdict: completion conditions remain adequate and not weakened for behavior recall, feedback writeback, and task lifecycle because current proxy-level implementation is explicitly framed as non-completion-grade and the docs require behavior recall ledgers, correction retrieval/conflict handling, answer-quality evaluation, finish-task lifecycle traces, and verify:goal inclusion before completion can be claimed.
decisions: R4 verdict is AGREE; no blocking objections found.
No required doc changes for the reviewed lens.

Current code limitations in behavior-eval.ts, compounding.ts, and record_feedback_correction remain acceptable because docs treat them as scaffold/proxy behavior and require stronger completion gates.
